subject: Migrate CI workflows from actions-rs to modern alternatives
description:
**Phase 1.1: CI/CD Modernization**

Replace deprecated actions-rs workflows in .github/workflows/:
- Replace actions-rs/toolchain with dtolnay/rust-toolchain
- Replace actions-rs/cargo with direct cargo commands
- Update all workflow files to use modern actions
- Add cargo-deny for supply chain security
- Pin actions to SHA with version comments per CLAUDE.md

**Files to update:**
- .github/workflows/*.yml (all workflow files)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- No actions-rs references remain
- All workflows use SHA-pinned actions
- cargo-deny integrated
- Workflows pass on test run
